Inspiration. So, you might be one of those people who thinks that before you need to take an action, you need inspiration. You might be one of those people who already takes so much action that you've worked yourself into a rut where you look for inspiration externally on what you could do next. You might be one of those people who follows pages on Instagram, who's more visual, who has a lot of inspiration come from material items or from other people's success. You might be one of those people who sits there every day and has posters on your wall or a vision board or whatever it is that you do personally for inspiration or if you lack inspiration. Some of the things that I do and that I've done that have enabled me to put myself in a constant state where I'm always out every single second of every single day. There's never a time where I'm not surrounded by something which I truly enjoy and just believe is the absolute most beautiful thing I could be around. My place in which I live, my office in which I operate, the places that I travel, the people that I see, the people that are around me, every single thing in which I draw into my day I can create inspiration from. The books that I read, the people that I talk to, the videos that I watch, the music that I listen to, the way that I create in my day to day, so many things can inspire you. But once again, one of the key things that you have to look for is just what is that one tick, that one piece of self-aware advice or one piece of self-awareness that you're missing right now that's disabling you from seeing everything around you as a constant state of inspiration that you can pull from as a creative source, from the shape of things to the details of every item around you to the concept, the thought, the intention, the power, the structure, the material, every single thing around you to the sparkle in your marble countertop to the bug that's crawling on your wall. If you're still living in the slums, whatever it is, it doesn't matter where you are, what you're looking at, you could be at the Versace Mansion down on Ocean Drive. You could be in the middle of Idaho not doing anything but looking out of a potato farm. I guarantee you whether it be the smallest thing that you have to get down on your hands and knees to see, take time to observe, get a magnifying glass to look at, to looking up simply at night at the stars, to going throughout your day and taking in all of the creativity, all of the flow, every single thing around you that went in to all of which we see operate, live and breathe every single day. Inspiration is everywhere and you have to have the ability to justify what you are going to do with the inspiration. Everything in life sources to you needing an intention to be able to pull the power from it. Don't go throughout your day losing sight of what you want to create. The power to inspiration, sorry, down the power to inspiration is you maintaining an ability to see it, to feel it more importantly. Sometimes to hear it, but more importantly to use it with an intention. Something that you constantly want to create. Constantly think of what is it that you can do next? What is it that you can draw forth that doesn't exist yet? And what is it that you need to be looking for every day that you can see, feel and hear to then use with an intention to fulfill something? Inspiration is simply a necessity for you to take all of which you experience and apply it into something else to use all of that that you have gathered and put it into something. Inspiration is easy.
